sys_ui_action.comments: Create a subtask for all Sub OUs of the OU selected in the Primary Assignee field 2.8.4 | 2023-11-06 | raj | STRY0146507 - Certification Support- Placeholder - added role to UI Action 2.8.3HF | 2023-09-24 | DFCT0012179 - DIA - Tasks not getting created when using "Select to Create Subtasks for Each OU" with 30 OUs or more under the primary assignee 2.5 P3 -- removed "Show insert" this should not be shown on insert.
sys_ui_action.hint: Create a subtask for each OU Child of the Primary Assignee OU
sys_ui_action.name: Create Subtasks for each Sub OUs
sys_ui_action.sys_name: Create Subtasks for each Sub OUs
